scope.target: Wondermove-Inc/new-mobile-app PR #12 auto-merge operation and allow_auto_merge repository setting

checks_reviewed.evidence: Documents Quality gate, auto-merge workflow, native gh pr merge --auto --squash --match-head-commit, no bypass behavior, and external Allow auto-merge requirement.

Workflow triggers on completed Quality gate workflow_run, limits to successful PRs targeting main, avoids checkout, verifies state/draft/head SHA, and uses gh pr merge --auto --squash --match-head-commit.

Validator enforces auto-merge workflow shape, required permissions, exact head guard, native auto-merge, no --admin, no checkout, no PAT/hardcoded tokens, and requires PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md to document auto-merge workflow.
Skill preserves branch/PR workflow, forbids self-approval and failed-gate pass-through, treats GitHub actions as external-platform proof, and requires evidence without downgrading failed gates.
Prompt-provided final observed state: Quality gate check SUCCESS before merged state.
Prompt-provided final observed state: repository setting allow_auto_merge true; PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md line 361 correctly classifies this as external proof local validators cannot prove.
Reviewed operation was external repository setting enablement plus PR auto-merge processing, not a source implementation change requiring new tests. Existing source validator coverage was reviewed.
No mobile UI/runtime files were in scope; no Expo Router, React Native, NativeWind, semantic token, selector, or shadcn/ui changes were reviewed.
No API contract or packages/contracts changes were in scope.

residual_risks: Live GitHub repository setting and PR state were not independently queried in this read-only source review; they are accepted from the prompt as external-platform proof.
Future changes to branch protection, rulesets, merge queue, or workflow token permissions remain external platform state and cannot be proven by local validators.
